description_long: This object is a virtual reality headset, specifically resembling the Oculus Quest, designed for immersive digital experiences. The headset features a smooth, matte black exterior with a prominent front face and integrated cameras for spatial tracking. It has a sturdy, adjustable head strap system that wraps over and around the head for secure and comfortable wear. The interior side reveals two large lenses for stereoscopic vision, surrounded by a cushioned face pad for comfort during extended use. The device is compact, with a slightly curved front and minimalistic design, and includes subtle branding on the front. Its construction suggests a combination of durable plastic, glass for the lenses, and soft foam padding for user comfort.
description: A sleek, matte black virtual reality headset with integrated cameras, adjustable head straps, and cushioned face padding. The device is compact and ergonomically designed for immersive digital experiences.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth, curved face of the headset with subtle branding and integrated tracking cameras.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the adjustable head strap and the headset's depth, as well as the camera placement on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual lenses and cushioned face pad, along with the top and side straps for head support.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the head strap and side profile of the headset.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, head movement, touch sensors
